elements.text: Your anniversary with your significant other is this weekend, but they haven't mentioned to you that they made any big plans. Having your expectations let down seems to be a recurring event, and you think it's time to bring it up to them. You figure out a way to bring it up calmly, without starting a...

elements.name: anniversary_let-down--romantic_relationships--puzzle1
